Title: SSO Authentication and ROLE_FAULT_WRITE Permission
Preconditions: Customer Service Agent has valid SSO credentials and ROLE_FAULT_WRITE permission
Steps: Login with SSO credentials | Verify ROLE_FAULT_WRITE permission

Title: Fault Creation via API
Preconditions: Valid request payload and authenticated user
Steps: Send POST request to /api/v1/faults/raise | Verify HTTP 202 Accepted response
Expected Result: Ticket Reference ID received within sub-second latency

Title: Idempotent Fault Submission
Preconditions: Valid request payload and authenticated user
Steps: Send duplicate POST requests to /api/v1/faults/raise | Verify only one ticket is created

Title: FaultCreatedEvent Processing
Preconditions: Valid FaultCreatedEvent published to Kafka topic
Steps: Verify event is processed by parallel consumer groups | Verify failures are isolated between consumers
Expected Result: Successful event processing and isolation of failures

Title: Request Payload Validation
Steps: Send invalid POST request to /api/v1/faults/raise | Verify validation error response
